subcodes.first_line: O my Supreme Lord and Refuge of the distressed in Thy Most Glorious Kingdom! Verily, Thy servant Riḍá hath forsaken this abode [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربی الاعلی و ملجاء المضطرین فی ملکوته الابهی ان عبدک رضا قد ترک هذه الدار
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @prayer for the departed, @prayer for children and youth, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
